resources.string: One of the most popular songs by CAS, this track acts as a \'grown-up\' lullaby and a promise of deep protection between two lovers...
Following two lonely souls who meet on a rainy night, this song captures a fleeting yet powerful encounter...
Driven by deep passion and admiration, this song expresses a love so profound that the singer is willing to build an entire opera house...
This track beautifully describes two lovers who share a mutual connection of true love...
Serving as the second single, this ambient dream-pop track depicts sensual musings about a current lover...
A mesmerizing cover of the 1992 Brooks & Dunn track, telling the story of a man who lost his life\'s love...
Told from the perspective of the less affectionate partner, delving into toxic relationship dynamics...
